heading: Omitted
label: 1244 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to apportionment of funds between the Minnesota Chippewa Tribe, the Turtle Mountain Band of Chippewas of North Dakota, and the Chippewa-Cree Tribe of Montana, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub.
